theme.name: Midnight Studio
theme.description: A deep, immersive environment for songwriters. Focuses on typography, negative space, and a 'studio' atmosphere.

CategoryTabs.inactive_class: bg-[#1A1A1A] text-gray-400 border border-[#27272A] hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 hover:text-white transition-all duration-300
CategoryTabs.container: flex overflow-x-auto pb-4 gap-3 no-scrollbar mask-linear-fade

SongCard.structure: p-6 rounded-xl border border-[#27272A] bg-[#121212] group relative overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 hover:border-[#D4AF37]/50 hover:shadow-2xl hover:-translate-y-1
SongCard.title: font-serif text-2xl mb-2 group-hover:text-[#D4AF37] transition-colors
SongCard.footer: flex justify-between items-center mt-auto border-t border-[#27272A] pt-4

LyricsEditor.title_input: bg-transparent border-none text-4xl md:text-5xl font-serif font-bold placeholder:text-gray-700 focus:ring-0 px-0 w-full
LyricsEditor.body_textarea: bg-transparent border-none text-lg font-mono text-gray-300 focus:ring-0 px-0 w-full resize-none min-h-[60vh] leading-loose custom-scrollbar

Buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-semibold hover:bg-[#F2C94C] shadow-lg shadow-[#D4AF37]/20

background_texture.usage: absolute inset-0 opacity-10 mix-blend-overlay pointer-events-none z-0 fixed

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure text-muted-foreground (#A1A1AA) is only used on dark backgrounds for sufficient contrast.

do_not_use: Rounded-full buttons for main actions (use rounded-md or rounded-lg for 'studio gear' feel)
must_do: Use data-testid on all interactive elements
Ensure modal backgrounds are NOT transparent without blur
Implement custom scrollbar for lyrics area

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup: Install fonts (Playfair Display, Manrope, JetBrains Mono) via Google Fonts import in index.css.
2. Theme: Apply the dark theme variables to tailwind.config.js and index.css immediately.
3. Structure: Create a Layout component that includes the background texture overlay.
4. State: Use Firestore for all data. Handle loading states with skeletons, not spinners.
5. Editor: The Lyrics Editor should feel like a 'Distraction Free' mode. When open, it should dim the rest of the app.
6. Categories: Implement 'Add New Category' directly within the dropdown or as a prominent tab action.
7. Styling: Use the provided color palette. Do not deviate to default Tailwind colors.
